title: Launch game with valid unique team names initializes scores to zero
description: Verifies the host can add teams with unique non-empty names and successfully launch the game with all scores shown as 0.

steps.description: Click on the control to add a team row
Click on the control to add a team row
Type "Team Alpha" into the first team name field
Type "Team Beta" into the second team name field

title: Empty team name blocks launch with validation message
description: Verifies launching is prevented when any team name is empty and the correct validation error is shown.

steps.description: Click on the control to add a team row
Type "Team Alpha" into the first team name field
Verify text "Team name cannot be empty" is visible

title: Duplicate team names block launch with uniqueness validation
description: Verifies launching is prevented when two teams share the same name and the correct validation error is shown.

steps.description: Click on the control to add a team row
Click on the control to add a team row
Type "Team Alpha" into the first team name field
Type "Team Alpha" into the second team name field
Verify text "Team names must be unique" is visible

title: Adding teams beyond maximum is prevented and shows maximum reached message
description: Verifies the UI enforces the maximum team limit and provides a visible message when the host tries to exceed it.

steps.description: Click on the control to add a team row repeatedly until the UI no longer adds new rows
Click on the control to add a team row one more time
Verify text "Maximum teams reached" is visible

title: Remove an optional team row and launch with remaining valid teams
description: Verifies the host can remove a previously added team row and still launch successfully with remaining valid unique names.

steps.description: Click on the control to add a team row
Click on the control to add a team row
Type "Team Alpha" into the first team name field
Type "Team Beta" into the second team name field
Click on the control to remove the second team row

title: Whitespace-only team name is treated as empty and blocks launch
description: Verifies a team name consisting only of spaces triggers the empty-name validation and prevents game launch.

steps.description: Click on the control to add a team row
Type "   " into the first team name field
Verify text "Team name cannot be empty" is visible

title: Fix duplicate names after validation and successfully launch
description: Verifies the host can correct a duplicate-name validation error and then launch the game successfully.

steps.description: Click on the control to add a team row
Click on the control to add a team row
Type "Team Alpha" into the first team name field
Type "Team Alpha" into the second team name field
Verify text "Team names must be unique" is visible
Type "Team Beta" into the second team name field

title: Fix empty name after validation and successfully launch
description: Verifies the host can correct an empty-name validation error and then launch the game successfully.

steps.description: Click on the control to add a team row
Type "Team Alpha" into the first team name field
Verify text "Team name cannot be empty" is visible
Type "Team Beta" into the second team name field

title: End-to-end: draw question, reveal answer, run Attempt 1 correct, end question updates leaderboard
description: Verifies the host can draw a random question, reveal answer/hints, score a team as correct in Attempt 1, and see the leaderboard reflect the added points after ending the question.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Verify element "Question" is visible in the center panel
Select a team from the Team Control

title: Attempt 1 wrong applies penalty; Attempt 2 correct applies score; end question completes flow
description: Verifies penalties and scoring can be applied across Attempt 1 (wrong) and Attempt 2 (correct) for different teams within the same question.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Verify element "Question" is visible in the center panel
Select a team from the Team Control
Select another team from the Team Control

title: Rapid consecutive next-question clicks prevent duplicate question draw (duplicate prevented warning when applicable)
description: Verifies clicking next question twice in quick succession does not show a duplicate question; if a duplicate draw is attempted, a visible warning is shown.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Verify element "Question" is visible in the center panel
Verify element "Question" is visible in the center panel
Verify text "Duplicate question prevented" is visible

title: Undo last scoring action reverses a just-applied mark
description: Verifies the host can undo the last scoring action after marking a team correct, returning the visible score/leaderboard state to the pre-mark state.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Select a team from the Team Control

title: Manual score adjustment applies and is reflected in visible leaderboard/score display
description: Verifies the host can apply a manual score adjustment to a team and see the updated score reflected on screen.

steps.description: Select a team from the Team Control
Type "5" into the manual score adjustment value field

title: Skip question moves to a different question without ending/scoring the current one
description: Verifies the host can skip the current question and see a different question displayed afterward.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Verify element "Question" is visible in the center panel
Verify element "Question" is visible in the center panel

title: Leaderboard updates immediately after marking a team Correct
description: Verifies that scoring a team as Correct updates the live leaderboard and reflects the new ordering by score.

steps.description: Click on the control to mark a team as "Correct"
Verify the leaderboard list is visible
Verify the score displayed for the affected team increases
Verify the leaderboard order is sorted with the highest score shown at the top
Verify the active team is visually highlighted in the leaderboard

title: Leaderboard updates immediately after marking a team Wrong
description: Verifies that scoring a team as Wrong updates the live leaderboard without incorrectly increasing that team's score.

steps.description: Click on the control to mark a team as "Wrong"
Verify the leaderboard list is visible
Verify the score displayed for the affected team does not increase
Verify the leaderboard order remains correctly sorted by score
Verify the active team is visually highlighted in the leaderboard

title: Leaderboard remains sorted after multiple scoring actions across teams
description: Verifies that after several scoring actions, the leaderboard remains correctly sorted by score and is stable/consistent.

steps.description: Click on the control to mark a team as "Correct"
Click on the control to mark a (different) team as "Correct"
Click on the control to mark a team as "Wrong"
Verify the leaderboard order is sorted with the highest score shown at the top
Verify the leaderboard shows all teams currently in the game

title: End Game shows final standings view
description: Verifies that clicking End Game transitions the UI to a final standings/results display.

steps.description: Verify the final standings list is visible
Verify the final standings are sorted with the highest score shown at the top

title: End Game results include section-attempt warning list
description: Verifies that after ending the game, the UI shows warnings for teams that did not attempt required sections (Section 1 and Section 2).

steps.description: Verify a warning list is visible showing teams that did not attempt Section 1
Verify a warning list is visible showing teams that did not attempt Section 2

title: End Game is prevented when no teams are configured
description: Verifies validation appears and End Game does not proceed when the game has no teams defined.

steps.description: Verify text "Cannot end game: no teams configured" is visible
Verify text "Final Standings" is not visible
Verify element "End Game" is still visible

title: End Game is prevented when game state is empty
description: Verifies validation appears and the app remains in the live game view if the game state is empty.

steps.description: Verify text "Cannot end game: no teams configured" is visible
Verify the live leaderboard is still visible
Verify text "Final Standings" is not visible

title: Reset game is available from end-game results and returns to live state
description: Verifies that after ending the game, the host can reset the game and return to the live gameplay view with the leaderboard visible.

steps.description: Click on the control labeled "Reset" or "Reset Game"
Verify text "Final Standings" is not visible

title: Draw a random question for a chosen section and reveal answer + hints
description: Verifies the host can select a section, draw a non-repeating random question, and manually reveal its answer and hints.

steps.description: Verify text "Next Random Question" is visible
Select a section from the section selector
Verify a question is visible on the page
Verify a question ID is visible on the page
Verify the answer is visible on the page

title: Draw multiple random questions and verify question ID changes (non-repeating)
description: Verifies consecutive draws for the same section show different question IDs, indicating no repeats.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Verify a question ID is visible on the page
Verify a question is visible on the page
Verify the question ID is different than the previously shown question ID

title: Duplicate prevention messaging when a repeated question would be returned
description: Verifies the UI shows a duplicate-prevention notice and allows the host to request again.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Verify a question ID is visible on the page
Verify text "Duplicate question prevented" is visible
Verify a question is visible on the page

title: Reveal Answer control remains available after drawing a question
description: Verifies that after a random question is displayed, the host can reveal the answer using the provided control.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Verify the answer is visible on the page

title: Switch sections and draw a question in the newly selected section
description: Verifies section selection affects the random draw context and a question is displayed after switching sections.

steps.description: Select a section from the section selector
Verify a question ID is visible on the page
Select a different section from the section selector
Verify a question is visible on the page

title: Attempt 1 correct scoring applies and question can be ended
description: Verifies that starting Attempt 1, scoring Correct adds points, and ending the question completes the lifecycle.

steps.description: Select a team from the Team Control dropdown
Verify text "+40" is visible OR verify text "+60" is visible
Verify text "Question ended" is visible OR verify text "Next question" is visible

title: Wrong penalty on Attempt 1 then correct scoring on Attempt 2 for another team
description: Verifies wrong scoring applies a penalty, Attempt 2 can start, team can change, and correct scoring adds points before ending the question.

steps.description: Select a team from the Team Control dropdown
Verify text "-10" is visible OR verify text "-20" is visible
Select a different team from the Team Control dropdown

title: Attempt 2 correct scoring after switching teams
description: Verifies that after Attempt 2 is started and a new team is selected, Correct adds points and the question can be ended.

steps.description: Select a team from the Team Control dropdown
Select a different team from the Team Control dropdown
Verify text "+40" is visible OR verify text "+60" is visible

title: Prevent duplicate scoring on the same attempt and show warning
description: Verifies the system blocks a second Correct click for the same attempt and displays an 'Already scored' warning.

steps.description: Select a team from the Team Control dropdown
Verify text "Already scored for this attempt" is visible
Verify element "Undo Last Action" is visible

title: Undo Last Action reverts an accidental scoring action
description: Verifies that using Undo removes the most recent score change from the UI.

steps.description: Select a team from the Team Control dropdown
Verify text "+40" is visible OR verify text "+60" is visible
Verify text "+40" is not visible AND verify text "+60" is not visible

title: Skip Question marks the question as skipped and returns control without scoring
description: Verifies that skipping an active question records it as skipped and does not apply any score change.

steps.description: Verify text "Skipped" is visible OR verify text "Question skipped" is visible
Verify text "+40" is not visible AND verify text "+60" is not visible
Verify text "-10" is not visible AND verify text "-20" is not visible

title: Attempt controls are blocked until a team is selected
description: Verifies the host cannot start an attempt without choosing a team first (guardrail against accidental scoring).

steps.description: Verify text "Select a team" is visible OR verify text "Please select a team" is visible
Verify text "Attempt 1 started" is not visible
Select a team from the Team Control dropdown

title: End Question is blocked until an attempt is started or a question is active
description: Verifies the app prevents ending a question when no active question/attempt exists and provides visible feedback.

steps.description: Verify text "No active question" is visible OR verify text "Nothing to end" is visible
Select a team from the Team Control dropdown

title: Undo last scoring action updates leaderboard
description: Verifies that undoing after at least one scoring action reverts the last change and updates the visible leaderboard.

steps.description: Click on "Score" (or the primary scoring control for the current question/attempt)
Verify element "Undo Last Action" is visible

title: Manual score adjustment applies and is undoable
description: Verifies that a manual adjustment changes the leaderboard and the change can be reverted using undo.

steps.description: Type "5" into the manual adjustment value field

title: Recover from accidental double scoring via Undo
description: Verifies that applying scoring twice can be corrected by undoing once, and the app remains stable with correct messaging/UI state.

steps.description: Click on "Score" (or the primary scoring control for the current question/attempt)
Click on "Score" (or the same scoring control) again
Verify element "Undo Last Action" is visible

title: Invalid manual adjustment input shows a clear error and does not apply
description: Verifies that non-numeric manual adjustment input is rejected with a visible message and does not change state.

steps.description: Type "abc" into the manual adjustment value field

title: Attempt to apply manual adjustment without a value shows required message
description: Verifies that applying a manual adjustment with an empty value is blocked and a clear required/validation message is shown.

steps.description: Click on the manual adjustment value field

title: End Game shows final standings and non-attempt warnings for both sections
description: Verifies that ending the game displays final sorted standings and informational warnings listing teams that did not attempt Section 1 and Section 2.

steps.description: Verify text "did not attempt" is visible

title: End Game before any attempts shows all teams listed in warnings with no auto-penalty note
description: Verifies that if the host ends the game before any Section 1 or Section 2 attempts, the warnings list all teams for the relevant sections and explicitly state no automatic penalties are applied.

steps.description: Verify text "did not attempt" is visible

title: Final standings are presented in a clearly sorted order at end of game
description: Verifies that the final leaderboard indicates an ordered ranking (e.g., by rank position) rather than an unsorted list.

title: Warnings are informational only and explicitly state no penalties are applied
description: Verifies the end-of-game warning copy is clearly informational and includes a visible statement that no automatic penalty is applied.

title: End Game view includes separate warnings for Section 1 and Section 2 (not a combined/ambiguous warning)
description: Verifies that the UI distinguishes non-attempt reporting for Section 1 vs Section 2 with separate labels/sections.

steps.description: Verify text "did not attempt" is visible
Verify text "did not attempt" is visible

title: End Game is resilient to rapid repeated clicks and still shows the same end-of-game report
description: Verifies that quickly clicking End Game multiple times does not break the UI and the end-of-game report remains visible and stable.

steps.description: Verify text "did not attempt" is visible
